rule_text: Price Adjustment under GO 94/2003 was originally granted only for works with administered prices, estimated above Rs.2 crore AND completion period >18 months — applicable within original or department-extended period only. (NOTE: superseded by GO Ms No 62/2021 which lowers threshold to Rs.40 lakh AND 6 months — see AP-GO-019.)
verification_method: For pre-30-Nov-2021 agreements: PA applies only if ECV>Rs.2cr AND period>18mo; post-2021 use GO 62/2021 thresholds (Rs.40L, 6mo)

rule_text: Mobilization Advance under GO 94/2003 is permitted up to 10% of contract value for AP works costing more than Rs.1 crore, against Bank Guarantee, attracting suitable interest, recoverable from contractor's bills in installments. (Forms baseline restored by GO 57/2024 after 2019-2024 cancellation gap.)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue>10000000
verification_method: For tenders pre-17-Dec-2019 OR post-27-Nov-2024: MA <= 10% AND BG-backed AND interest-charged AND installment recovery

rule_text: Construction materials (cement, steel, bitumen, sand, metal, soils) for AP works must be procured by the contractor at his own cost — department does NOT supply principal materials.
verification_method: Check tender SCC explicitly assigns cement/steel/bitumen/sand procurement to contractor; reject if dept-supplied materials specified

rule_text: Seignorage charges in AP works are recovered from contractor's bills at rates prescribed in contract documents for materials actually used; production of seignorage-payment evidence and 5× penalty (under GO Ms No 243/1986) is DISPENSED with — bill-deduction is sufficient.
verification_method: Check tender SCC: seignorage recovered via bill-deduction at contracted rates; reject if 5× penalty clause for missing payment-evidence is still present
